title: Use the Read tool to read the file d:/remote-age

messages.text: Use the Read tool to read the file d:/remote-agent/package.json (just the first 5 lines are fine), then reply with one short sentence saying what the project is called.

parts.text:
The user is asking me to:
1. Read the file d:/remote-agent/package.json (just the first 5 lines)
2. Reply with one short sentence saying what the project is called

I'll use the Read tool with a limit of 5 lines.

parts.name: Read
parts.output:
1	{
2	  "name": "remote-agent",
3	  "version": "0.1.0",
4	  "private": true,
5	  "description": "Phone gateway for Claude Code — chat with your local Claude Code sessions from your phone over LAN, Tailscale, or Cloudflare.",

parts.text: The project is called "remote-agent" - it's a phone gateway for Claude Code that allows chatting with local Claude Code sessions from a phone over LAN, Tailscale, or Cloudflare.
The project is called "remote-agent," a phone gateway for Claude Code that lets you chat with your local Claude Code sessions from your phone over LAN, Tailscale, or Cloudflare.
